title: Pillager Queen
description: A concept for a final boss to conclude pillager raids! The original idea for the mob was selected from a competition where 8 fantastic builders submitted organic builds representing new ideas for Minecraft. Congrats to Spritzu for their idea being chosen!
body:
### This mod is looking for a maintainer, as in it's current form it's a concept and not planned to be updated. If you are interested in taking over, please [join our discord](http://discord.gg/syszee) and reach out to me or a staff member.
> • Everything is obtainable in survival mode. You can summon the Pillager Queen by participating in a high level pillager raid. > • As of right now, the Pillager Queen does not drop any new items. We've configured a high number of experience and special items to be dropped for now. > • Not currently fixing bugs or issues, as this is a concept.
Thank you to Malte for modeling, ZainJX for minor code assistance, and Spritzu for the original concept. [You can watch the original video here!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0SL9wpFbDPk)
